name: project-context
description: Maintain project context across sessions with structured files. 5 markdown files + dependencies.json for monorepos and cross-repo dependencies. Brainstorm-first workflow: discuss → plan → implement → update. Federated dependency graph via /add-dependency command — supports both local paths and git URLs (fetches only .project-context/ from remote repos). Leverages native Claude Code features: Agent Teams for parallel execution, Plan Mode for research-first planning, and persistent Tasks for cross-session tracking. Includes smart routing, session continuity, quick mode, and adversarial challenge mode.
